sentences.arabic: شَعَرَتْ فَاطِمَةُ بِأَلَمٍ شَدِيدٍ فِي مَعِدَتِهَا أَمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Fatima je jučer osjetila jak bol u stomaku.
sentences.translationEn: Fatima felt a severe pain in her stomach yesterday.

sentences.translation: Posjetila je bolnicu i srela se sa ljekarom specijalistom.
sentences.translationEn: She visited the hospital and met the specialist doctor.

sentences.arabic: فَحَصَهَا الطَّبِيبُ ثُمَّ كَتَبَ لَهَا وَصْفَةً طِبِّيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Ljekar ju je pregledao, a zatim joj napisao recept.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor examined her then wrote her a medical prescription.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ الآنَ تَشْعُرُ بِتَحَسُّنٍ كَبِيرٍ بَعْدَ تَنَاوُلِ العِلَاجِ.
sentences.translation: Ona se sada osjeća mnogo bolje nakon uzimanja terapije.
sentences.translationEn: She now feels a great improvement after taking the treatment.
